---
title: "DHS Survey data"
format: html
editor: visual
---

## Read Data

```{r}

data <- read.csv("~/Desktop/Class/2026 Spring/Computational Social Science/CSS LABS/idhs_00002.csv")

```

## How many rows? Columns?

```{r}
nrow(data)
ncol(data)
```

## Visualize

```{r}
# Histogram of age
hist(data$AGE)

data %>% ggplot(aes(x=AGE))+ geom_histogram(bindidth = 1, color ="grey", fill = "pink")

#Relationship between age and ideal family size(IDEALKID;top-coded at 50)
library(ggplot2)
library(tidyverse)

library(dplyr)

#step1
deal_kid_by_age <- data %>% 
  filter(IDEALKID < 50) %>% 
  group_by(AGE) %>% 
  summarize(ideal_children_avg = mean(IDEALKID))

#step2
deal_kid_by_age %>% 
  ggplot(aes(x=AGE , y=ideal_children_avg)) +
  geom_point() +
  geom_line(size=1)+
  cowplot::theme_cowplot() +
labs(x="AGE", y ="Ideal Children")
  
```
